# Joanna Wrobel

> UX Designer, Figma Expert, and Design Mentor based in Gdansk, Poland. Available for remote work and 1:1 mentorship worldwide.

Joanna Wrobel is a UX designer with 12 years of design experience, 8 of which are focused on UX. She specialises in design systems, Figma, advanced prototyping, and AI-assisted UX workflows. She is equally passionate about digital illustration and animation, and runs a separate Instagram account dedicated to her artwork.

## What Joanna does

- **UX Design**: End-to-end product design, user research, design systems, component libraries, interaction design
- **Figma**: Advanced prototyping, variables, auto layout, design tokens, component architecture
- **Design Systems**: Building and scaling design systems for digital products
- **AI in UX**: Integrating AI tools into the UX design process; experimenting with AI-assisted workflows
- **Illustration & Animation**: Digital illustration, sketches, and process videos
- **UX Mentorship**: Paid 1:1 sessions on Figma, career guidance, design critique, and process improvement

## Mentorship offer

Joanna offers paid 1:1 mentorship sessions for UX designers, UI designers, product designers, and design students. Topics covered:

- Figma deep dives (variables, prototyping, advanced components)
- Career advice for designers
- Design critique and portfolio review
- Design process and workflow improvement
- UX problem-solving

Spots are limited. Prospective mentees can join the waitlist at https://joannawrobel.com

## Resources & products

- **Notion Case Study Template**: A template for documenting UX work with a process-first approach. Available on Gumroad: https://joannawrobel.gumroad.com/l/notion-case-study
- **Variables Ebook** (coming soon): A resource on Figma Variables. Subscribe to her mailing list for early access and subscriber-only pricing: https://newsletter.joannawrobel.com

## Background

- 12 years in design, 8 years focused on UX
- Drawn to design since childhood
- Specialises in design systems and advanced prototyping
- Equally passionate about illustration and animation
- Currently experimenting with how AI can genuinely support the UX process
- Based in Gdansk, Poland — works remotely with clients and mentees worldwide
